case_title: COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. VS. S&R WEST HOLDINGS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60647867) AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, PATRICIA DOES 1 TO 10
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-20-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) PATRICIA WEST OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-20-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S&R WEST HOLDINGS LLC RAY, SUZANNE $1,093.10 PRINCIPAL, $325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $235.98 INTEREST, $361.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,015.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60647867)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 60807983) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT S&R WEST HOLDINGS LLC RAY, SUZANNE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 59933801), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. SERVED NOV-10-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, MAILING DATE NOV-14-2016 AS TO DEFENDANT S&R WEST HOLDINGS LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT [DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO] (TRANSACTION ID # 59933801), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. SERVED NOV-12-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-14-2016 AS TO DEFENDANT RAY, SUZANNE
DECLARATION OF ELAINE JONES TOMBARI RE DEFAULT, CCP SECTION 585(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 60647867) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT S&R WEST HOLDINGS LLC WEST, PATRICIA RAY, SUZANNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-03-2017
DECLARATION OF KAIPO K.B. YOUNG RE INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 60647867) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $361.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 60647867) AS TO DEFENDANT S&R WEST HOLDINGS LLC RAY, SUZANNE
